headline: Consumers Energy Prepares 2027 Reliability Action Plan for Fewer, Shorter Power Outages
summary: Consumers Energy is taking another significant step to secure Michigan's electric grid, preparing to file its 2027 Reliability Action Plan next week. If approved, this annual plan will lead to fewer and shorter power outages for Michiganders.

raw.headline: Consumers Energy Prepares 2027 Reliability Action Plan for Fewer, Shorter Power Outages

headline: 4 Defensive Stocks to Take Refuge in as Consumer Confidence Tanks
summary: Consumer confidence fell in May as inflation fears rose; Atmos Energy, CMS Energy, New York Times and Tyson Foods offer defense.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: During times of market turbulence and uncertainty, investors often turn to high-yielding dividend stocks. Here are the top picks from top analysts for three dividend stocks in the utilities sector.
